case_title: SUKH KHATANBAATAR VS. COMFORT RESTAURANT GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHATANBAATAR, SUKH AS TO DEFENDANT COMFORT RESTAURANT GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORP DBA 7TH STREET CAFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
